name: Brew & Bloom Cafe
corpus:
[Business website: https://brewandbloom.in]
Brew & Bloom Cafe — specialty coffee and fresh bakes in the heart of Kolkata. Visit us at 12 Park Street, Kolkata 700016. Open daily 8:00 AM to 9:00 PM. Call us on +91 98300 44821 or write to hello@brewandbloom.in. Follow us on Instagram @brewandbloomkolkata (https://instagram.com/brewandbloomkolkata).

name: Sharma Dental Clinic
corpus: [Delhi Dental Directory] Top clinics in South Delhi: Verma Dental Care (call 011 4155 9020), Smile Studio Saket, Sharma Dental Clinic and more.

[Business website: https://sharmadentalclinic.in]
Sharma Dental Clinic, Greater Kailash, Delhi. Book an appointment: 011 2924 7788. Email: appointments@sharmadentalclinic.in. Timings: Mon–Sat 10am–8pm.

name: Green Leaf Organics
corpus: [Pune Foodie Blog] Green Leaf Organics is a lovely little organic grocery in Pune stocking local farm produce, cold-pressed oils and millet flours. The owners are passionate about zero-waste packaging.
[Local news] Organic stores are booming in Pune; shops like Green Leaf Organics report growing footfall.

name: Mia's Bakery
corpus:
[Business website: https://miasbakery.co.uk]
Mia's Bakery — sourdough, pastries and celebration cakes, baked daily in Hackney. For orders and wholesale enquiries email orders@miasbakery.co.uk. We're closed Mondays.

name: TechFix Repairs
corpus:
[Business website: https://techfixrepairs.co.uk]
TechFix Repairs — same-day phone and laptop repairs. Ring us on +44 (0)20 7946 0958. Find us at 44 Camden High Street, London NW1. Open Mon-Fri 9:00-18:00, Sat 10:00-16:00.

corpus:

name: Royal Spice Restaurant
corpus: [OpenStreetMap] Royal Spice Restaurant, 218 Soho Road, Birmingham B21. opening_hours=Mo-Fr 11:00-23:00; Sa-Su 12:00-24:00. phone=+44 121 554 3390.

name: Cafe Milano
corpus: [TripAdvisor] Café Milano, Via del Corso 22, Rome — classic Italian espresso bar. Phone +39 06 6994 1205, email ciao@cafemilanoroma.it. Open 7:00-20:00 daily.
[Travel blog] The famous Café Milano in Rome has been serving espresso since 1962.

name: Chatterjee Sweets
corpus:
[Business website: https://chatterjeesweets.in]
Chatterjee Sweets — ঐতিহ্যবাহী বাঙালি মিষ্টি since 1948. রসগোল্লা, সন্দেশ, মিষ্টি দই। Address: 45 Rashbehari Avenue, Kolkata 700026. ফোন করুন: 033-2455-7890. Order online or email order@chatterjeesweets.in. খোলা: প্রতিদিন সকাল ৭টা থেকে রাত ১০টা (open daily 7am-10pm).
